payload.answer: I could not create durable memory from the article because the fetch failed with a 404 network error. No article claims were available to verify or extract.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so there are no source claims to extract or store.

details: Requested to remember article at https://example.com/missing for usefulness to memory architecture.
Mock fetch result indicated a 404 network error.
No memory cards were created because source content was unavailable.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Retry fetching the source later if the URL becomes available.
